## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.3

### 📷 Cameras
- Adds the APK/ADDX camera event-history path used by the X-Sense app for camera library events.
- Polls camera event history alongside AI notification history so regular motion can update even when the AI service list is empty.
- Routes camera event-history records back into the normal Home Assistant camera motion state.

### 🐛 Fixes
- Fixes a case where camera motion stayed unchanged after the AI history poll reported no services.
- Keeps AI notification history support while adding the separate regular camera event path.

### 🛠️ Debug
- Adds redacted debug logging for AI service-list response shape and camera event-history response shape.
- Logs camera event-history record counts, applied records, skipped records, and unmatched records without exposing raw payloads.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the APK/ADDX camera event-history endpoint and for motion updates when the AI service list is empty.
